name: Product Carton Breakdown
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Not all products can be shipped in a single carton, with a single set of dimensions. Flat pack furniture sets are a common example. A table and several chairs will each have a separate carton for ease of transport and warehousing."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products that are shipped in 2 or more boxes can have their individual carton sizes defined on the product page. This gives your customers a more accurate shipping cost, and simplifies the consignment and dispatch process."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To add the carton breakdown:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Advanced configuration", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Search in the name field for "}, {"text": "SHIPCOST_CAL_CARTONS", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on it in the results, change the value to "}, {"text": "Yes", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and click the "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This setting ensures the carton breakdown is used when calculating shipping costs."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the product that needs the carton breakdown defined."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to the shipping section, and click the "}, {"text": "Carton breakdown", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add Carton", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, and enter the carton dimensions and quantity."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Repeat this step until all of the product cartons have been entered."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}]
